message:
test(proptest): add property tests for robot_api_contracts (ft-3681t.4.5)

32 property tests covering serde roundtrips, ApiSurface exhaustiveness
(33 variants, unique command names), ContractMatrix coverage arithmetic,
ContractExecution counter consistency and blocking logic, ContractReport
verdict determination, and standard factory validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
